positive: A vibrant, modern abstract geometric pattern featuring intertwined celestial bodies and crystalline flora. The design should incorporate clean, bold silhouettes of planets, stylized crescent moons, and detailed bioluminescent flower petals. Use a limited, high-contrast color palette of deep indigo, electric cobalt, glowing teal, and burnt orange. Composition must be centralized and seamless, designed for all-over print on clothing. Style should be highly polished vector art mixed with cosmic watercolor washes, emphasizing sharp lines and smooth gradients. Focus on high contrast and strong visual rhythm.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, watermark, signature, low resolution, bad anatomy, extra limbs, noisy, messy, grainy, realistic photo, clutter, poorly drawn, muted colors
